testcase.name: test_category_celebrities_include_previous_week_price

failure.message: AssertionError: Celebrity should have previous_week_price field assert 'previous_week_price' in {'bio': 'Melissa Viviane Jefferson, known professionally as Lizzo, is an American singer, rapper, songwriter, and actress. Born in Detroit, Michigan, she moved to Houston, Texas, with her family at the age of 10. After college, she moved to Minneapolis, Minnesota, where she began her recording career in hip-hop. Lizzo released two studio albums, Lizzobangers (2013) and Big Grrrl Small World (2015), before signing with Nice Life Recording Company and Atlantic Records. Her first major-label extended play (', 'buzz_score': 0, 'category': 'musicians', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/16/Lizzo_September_2025.png/330px-Lizzo_September_2025.png', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_18_price_changes.py:118: in test_category_celebrities_include_previous_week_price assert "previous_week_price" in celeb, "Celebrity should have previous_week_price field" E AssertionError: Celebrity should have previous_week_price field E assert 'previous_week_price' in {'bio': 'Melissa Viviane Jefferson, known professionally as Lizzo, is an American singer, rapper, songwriter, and actress. Born in Detroit, Michigan, she moved to Houston, Texas, with her family at the age of 10. After college, she moved to Minneapolis, Minnesota, where she began her recording career in hip-hop. Lizzo released two studio albums, Lizzobangers (2013) and Big Grrrl Small World (2015), before signing with Nice Life Recording Company and Atlantic Records. Her first major-label extended play (', 'buzz_score': 0, 'category': 'musicians', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/16/Lizzo_September_2025.png/330px-Lizzo_September_2025.png', ...}
